subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí! We have heard of thy arrival in prison, and We make mention of thee that thy heart may be gladdened and that thou mayest be among them that hearken [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی قد سمعنا ورودک فی السجن و ذکرناک لیفرح فوادک و تکون من الذین سمعوا
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort
